# unicode_case_table.h

Generated lookup table. Do not edit by hand.

**Generated by:**
`src/common/unicode/generate-unicode_case_table.pl` [from-comment]
(`source/src/include/common/unicode_case_table.h:14-18`)

mapping (`lower`/`upper`/`title`/`fold`), including the
`MAX_CASE_EXPANSION = 3` multi-codepoint cases and Final_Sigma
context. [verified-by-code]

`src/common/unicode/` (drives the perl scripts against a freshly
downloaded UCD tree).
